data.title: Apple earnings beat estimates and raises outlook for services growth
data.description: Apple reported earnings above expectations and raised outlook for its services segment.
data.snippet: Analysts highlighted strong growth and a beat on earnings.

data.title: Fed inflation warning as CPI stays sticky and growth could slump
data.description: Macro investors reacted after Fed officials kept focus on inflation and warned of a possible growth slump.
data.snippet: The central bank remains cautious as CPI data stays elevated.

data.title: Microsoft cuts guidance as enterprise demand weakens
data.description: Microsoft cut guidance for part of its enterprise software business after weak demand trends.
data.snippet: Management flagged weak bookings and cut guidance.

data.title: Apple launch lifts product momentum with new device release
data.description: Apple launched a new device and investors pointed to strong product momentum.
data.snippet: The product release was viewed as a strong platform expansion.

data.title: Microsoft downgrade after weak cloud growth forecast
data.description: A broker issued a downgrade after a weak forecast for Azure growth.
data.snippet: The downgrade followed concerns over slowing enterprise demand.

data.title: Apple faces antitrust lawsuit over App Store rules
data.description: A new antitrust lawsuit targeted Apple over its App Store restrictions.
data.snippet: The lawsuit intensified legal pressure on the company.

data.title: Microsoft earnings beat and raises outlook for cloud growth
data.description: Microsoft reported stronger earnings and raised outlook for cloud revenue.
data.snippet: Investors focused on strong growth and a beat on earnings.

data.title: Fed warning as inflation and payrolls stay hot and equities slump
data.description: Fed speakers warned that inflation and payrolls remain too hot, raising concern about an equity slump.
data.snippet: Macro desks flagged the inflation warning as a risk event.

data.title: Apple cuts guidance after weak demand in China
data.description: Apple cut guidance after a weak demand patch in China hit near-term expectations.
data.snippet: The company warned of weaker sales and cut guidance.

data.title: Microsoft appoints CFO after finance chief resigns
data.description: Microsoft appointed a new CFO after its finance chief resigned.
data.snippet: The management transition drew cautious investor attention.

data.title: SPDR S&P 500 ETF upgraded as strategists turn optimistic
data.description: Wall Street strategists upgraded the market outlook and turned optimistic on the broad index.
data.snippet: The upgrade reflected stronger sentiment toward the S&P 500 ETF.

data.title: Apple acquisition expands AI platform roadmap
data.description: Apple announced an acquisition to expand its AI platform and product roadmap.
data.snippet: The acquisition was viewed as a strategic expansion.

data.title: Microsoft lowered rating to hold after margin decline
data.description: Analysts lowered their rating to hold after a margin decline and weaker estimates.
data.snippet: The downgrade followed concerns about slowing profitability.

data.title: Fed inflation warning as CPI stays sticky and equities slump again
data.description: Macro desks reacted after a fresh Fed inflation warning while equity markets threatened another slump.
data.snippet: The CPI release kept inflation in focus for investors.
